sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, score FLOAT, xml_col XML);
INSERT INTO test_data (id, score, xml_col) VALUES (1, NULL, '12');
INSERT INTO test_data (id, score, xml_col) VALUES (2, 10.5, '34');
INSERT INTO test_data (id, score, xml_col) VALUES (3, 20.7, '56');
SELECT REGR_COUNT(score, xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col)) AS regression_count FROM test_data WHERE score IS NOT NULL GROUP BY REGR_COUNT(score, xpath_string('/root/b', xml_col));
SELECT REGR_COUNT(x.y) AS count FROM (SELECT score AS y FROM test_data WHERE score > -100) AS x WHERE x.y IS NOT NULL;
SELECT REGR_COUNT(NULLIF(score, 10.5)), xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col) FROM test_data GROUP BY xpath_string('/root/b', xml_col) HAVING REGR_COUNT(NULLIF(score, 10.5)) > 0;
SELECT REGR_COUNT(score) OVER (PARTITION BY xpath_string('/root/a', xml_col)) AS reg_count FROM test_data WHERE xml_col IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_data AS SELECT id, REGR_COUNT(score) AS calc FROM test_data WHERE xml_col IS NOT NULL GROUP BY id HAVING calc > 1;
